name: Pineapple Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the cake flour once and mix with baking powder, salt, and baking soda together three times.
2. Cream butter thoroughly until light and fluffy. Gradually add sugar, beating continuously.
3. Add egg and egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Mix in melted chocolate until fully blended.
5. Alternate adding flour with milk, a small amount at a time, beating after each addition until smooth.
6. Stir in vanilla, then boiling water until thoroughly combined.
7. Bake the batter in two greased deep 9-inch layer pans or three 10-inch layers in a moderate oven (350°F) for 30 to 35 minutes, or until done.
8. Spread Pineapple Fluff Frosting between layers and on top and sides of cake.
This recipe does not require any changes to the original ingredients or instructions.
